reviews.review_description:
i like this game but like no one in 

 multiplayer

Love it! Would love to see more in this genre (3rd person miniature'ish retro shmup). Sincerely hope the developers make back what it must have cost to create, with all the levels and coop mode, it must have taken quite some time. Also hope the developers make more in this genre! Some ideas, in case you consider working more on this game: add an optional 1st person FOV mode, not that it would be my preferred way of playing, but because it's what some users expect, and could potentially drive some more sales.

If you are wanting to play a airplane game, this is not the game for you. It’s just a airplane in your hand and you shoot at tanks. It is not you flying. It is not the game that you are looking for. Do not buy this. ￼
I can't switch hands???   you guys didn't think some people would be left handed?

My 8 year old granddaughter plays Minecraft, so if you’re into that, it gets 5 Stars. However, if you don’t want your right controller to be the actual aircraft instead of you flying the plane and the left controller sucking up coins and various other options, it gets a 1 Star. Reminds me of my first Atari, well actually Atari was much better. Waste of money! Then again, I didn’t review it so shame on me! https://youtu.be/4LIkp4G_Nfc

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 
The graphical representation and gameplay are not from Minecraft but from the old arcade games from the 80s and 90s transferred to VR! The game clearly states in the description that this is not a flight arcade game so we are a bit puzzled by why you bought the game in the first place if that is what you expected! Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description:
Hi Developer Response,

You’re responding so much, are you flirting with me….lol. All jokes aside thx for the follow up. Glad to see some of the developers keeping up with community on here. I’ll be sure to let you know since you guys were kind enough to respond to my ONLY complaint directly. Beat the game but, still running up the board. 



I’ve yet to see anyone post this….IF YOURE A FAN OF CAPCOMS 1942 & 1943; this is your game. Taking a classic genre and bringing it to VR. Excellent job guys!

Updating my review. Love the game, haven’t noticed any glitches. Could use a level adjustment for seated players because it is a little tough to see all of what goin on in tunnel areas.  I should’ve been a little clearer regarding the seated. I found that day one, tunnel fighting view can get a little screwy.

This complaint comes from my 82yo father who loves CAPCOMS 1942 & 1943. He’s the reason we bought it. We have both enjoyed hours of this game! Again, excellent work TEAM!

Ooohhhh, you guys need to do an R-Type next. My nipples got hard just thinking about it!

developer_response.body: We actually enjoy making our customers happy, especially if it makes them write reviews like this! Thanks a lot, we have plans for more games in the future, be sure of it!

reviews.review_description:
I've been playing this for a couple of weeks.
Yeah graphics are a bit retro crap, but it's fun to play.

My only gripe really is the stupid method to collect coins etc. Using your second had with a tractor beam to collect items.
This is an absolute nightmare to use playing.
Missing coins because your not pointing it the correct direction. Missing things to shoot because your trying to collect the coins etc. 
I find it really hinders a good game experience.

There should be an option to auto collect items as that gun thing is so so so terrible.

Looses 1 star because of this and loose one star because the sitting option in setting seems to do nothing. 
I play sitting and I find myself still having to stand up at certain points.id like to play more,. It play a few levels before getting fed up of having to stand up when I select sitting option.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for playing our title and thank you for your feedback. Did you make sure to switch on sitting mode each time you boot up the game? As of right now, that is the only way to activate sitting mode consistently, we will however look into this. Please let us know if you still experience issues with this setting.

reviews.review_title: Emma Says this is a really good
reviews.review_description: I really recommend this it’s a cool game and it’s fun to play with friends I give this 1000000000000000000000 stars if you like shooting games this is good. For you and you can bye new planes and upgrades

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review, we hope Emma and you make it all the way to the final boss!

reviews.review_description: Incredibly good game, intense and cool to play. If you like retro shooter games then I highly recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, we hope just not retro gamers but any hardcore action gamer should enjoy this!

reviews.review_description: I was in two minds weather to get this but I'm glad I did, great gameplay very smooth, really got that just one more go to improve score vibe.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts on our game!

reviews.review_title: Big things come in small packages.
reviews.review_description: Me and my friends play this game, and it was an absolute blast! Especially the last level! It was wayy too fun.
If you're an older gamer and liked games like "River Raid" and "Blue Max", then this is a must-buy for you! Only this time it's in VR. ;-)

developer_response.body: Old skool is definitely our way and we are glad you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: Very fun I've been playing this since school was over it's a amazing game and some bugs? But some of them are fixed like the infinite lives glitch and this game is a workout to dodge those attacks and once again REALLY FUN Just ignored those 1,2,3,4 Stars cause this game is worth 14$ And Doing chores great game I just keep saying that but maybe they will add some new levels soon I can't wait for them even like other games because like this a Great shooter game and the bosses are fun but that's not the infinite life glitch it's like if you pause the game for a while it just keeps my 3 lives but still very good game would keep this game  recommed for Adventure, shooter and other stuff so 10/10 would play again

developer_response.body: Great to hear you have as much fun playing the game as we had to make it!

reviews.review_description: If you like Yuki or Shooty Skies, I can absolutely recommend this.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, both those games are a blast to play!

reviews.review_description: I really love the lay out and the fact that you are basically flying a plane with your hands and shooting at enemies. Great graphics and beautiful layout. I would definitely recommend to anyone

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you enjoy the game! We are constantly updating and improving the game so watch out for new content coming!

reviews.review_title: Really cool plane flying platfomer style
reviews.review_description: Very unique hope the can make other flying maps for warzones!

The game is fun, it is translated into my language (Spanish) and it has things that I really like, such as raising my arms or moving my body to be able to see over buildings, it is really fun.

However, the game has a big problem, the sudden appearance of the background scenery or even the appearance and disappearance of central elements such as the enemy boss plane, even my own plane disappears at times.

On the other hand, the distant background of the stage is really bad, it looks polygonal (in a bad way, it's not part of retro graphic art).

I like the simple polygonal graphics (except the background), the "retro" style is a good option for "1941", but these graphic errors of the appearance and disappearance of objects completely spoil the experience. Furthermore, due to its graphic simplicity, it is all the more reason that there should not be this type of errors. If you make a game with these graphics, few things can go wrong, because the little that could go wrong; It has gone wrong.

I have requested the return of the game. If the developers fix this and take advantage of the graphical possibilities of the Quest3 and mixed reality, I will buy the game again and I will surely enjoy it a lot. Saving the mistakes is a good game. Meanwhile it is a big disappointment.

reviews.review_title: One flew over the nazi nest
reviews.review_description:
Was on the fence about this game, seemingly minecraft type graphics and using your hand to control your plane, plus I remember that I wasn't much good at these types like 1942.
Having seen it had an easy mode made me decide to try it out.
Now having played it I have to say it is enjoyable but still frantic enough on easy mode for me(I'm not young) that's not a criticism, it should be challenging, but nice to be able to get through levels to advance and see what the game offers. Giving a chance to improve my at present low scores.

For the price you really can't complain, certain that it will bring hours of entertainment over time

developer_response.body: We are happy to hear that you found this challenging yet accessible enough!

reviews.review_description: This game is my favorite, but it needs a desperate update.     You don’t stay in the path, it takes you through buildings instead of around them.    The goals you go through are way off track.   Please update the game.    Thx.

Wow this game really takes advantage of VR it’s amazing. So fun.

Change ‘con’ to ‘com’

Thanks a billion!
